businessStructureTask.uncompletedTooltip: Select and then save to complete this task.
businessStructureTask.completedTooltip: This task is complete. You can edit your business structure selection below.
businessStructureTask.infoCallout:
:::miniCallout{ calloutType="informational" hideIcon="true" }

**You need to pick a business structure before forming your business.**

Business structure impacts who is responsible for debts and what rules you must follow.

You can change your business structure up until the “Register Your Business” step.

:::
businessStructureTask.successMessageNextStep: You can now [check available names and form your business](/tasks/form-business-entity).
